real_shared_ledger.note: assertion harness used a temporary ledger; shared ledger never opened for write

root_cause.summary: Claim extraction is metered under role 'executor' instead of 'claim_extractor'.
chain: round2_runner._wrap_paid_entrypoints binds only judge_llm->roles['planner'] and deepseek_llm_pro->roles['executor']
therefore the Claim extractor call increments calls_by_role['executor']
roles['claim_extractor'] is constructed by build_pilot_roles but never wired to any caller
impact: violates required assertion Claim extractor calls >= 1
claim extraction consumes the executor per-role cap (16) instead of the claim_extractor cap (1)
per-role budget accounting for claim extraction is incorrect
not_affected: gate still enforces budget (the call IS gated, only the role label/cap is wrong)
no ReAct / Planner / search_literature / legacy search_evidence involvement
exact-id deterministic routing, EvidenceCard construction and Shadow all behaved correctly

side_observations.verification_status: verifier_unavailable (expected: inner LLM was sentinel-blocked in this dry assertion)

actions_taken: A1 not run; B1 not run
